Placement_Notes: Within 5mm of U1 power island; bulk reservoir
Within 3mm; shared with I2C pull-up area
One cap per VCCINT ball; route directly under BGA
One each side of FPGA; 10mΩ ESR or better
Shared bulk for all VCCO banks
Within 5mm of U5 — same pour as VDDQ
Input to MPPT — handles solar panel capacitance
At output of 3.3V buck; differential pair across rails
At output of 0.9V buck — FPGA core hungry at startup
PMIC input bulk; at VIN1/VIN2/VIN3 pin cluster
Series cap NOT used — ODT is on-die; these are optional test caps for each DQ byte lane
Optional HF filter on each SPI line; omit if SI sim shows clean eyes
One each side of Y1; value tuned to crystal CL spec
Low-pass against RF coupling on I2C SDA
Low-pass against RF coupling on I2C SCL

Reference: ;; Total decoupling cap count: 88 references (some qty>1: total ~120 physical capacitors)
;;   1. 0402 caps: place on SAME layer as IC
;;   2. Bulk caps: via-in-pad or adjacent; minimize via inductance on return path
;;   3. FPGA VCCINT: use via-in-pad design; conventional vias too inductive at 200MHz
;;   4. Never share a decoupling cap between two different ICs on different power domains
;;   5. Cap GND return: via directly to GND plane L2 from cap GND pad — NOT daisy-chained
;;   6. POSCAP: orient so that the positive terminal connects closest to IC power pad
